name: costaff-agent-wrenai
description: [Specialty] Natural-language Business Intelligence over a self-hosted WrenAI GenBI deployment. [Capability] Translate plain-language data questions into SQL against a prepared MDL (semantic model); explain query results in natural language; generate Vega-Lite chart specs from result rows; accumulate few-shot SQL-pairs and instruction-style knowledge into WrenAI's qdrant index to improve future ask quality; check end-to-end health (HTTP + semantics-preparation status). [Constraint] Does NOT execute SQL — the agent returns SQL only; rows must come from the caller (database-agent or wren-ui). Bound to ONE mdl_hash + project_id pair per deployment (set at agent add time); switching schemas requires redeploy with new env. Typical ask < 30s but capped at WRENAI_ASK_TIMEOUT. Free WrenAI OSS only — no Cloud account needed. [Output] Generated SQL + reasoning + retrieved_tables list, natural-language answer for a (question, sql, rows) tuple, Vega-Lite chart spec for a (question, sql, rows) tuple, prep/health status report.
